title: StudioDash Website & SEO Analytics
seoTitle: StudioDash Website & SEO Analytics | BarkinMad Studios
description: Monitor website traffic, search visibility, and SEO performance with Cloudflare and Google Search Console in one place.
summary: StudioDash helps you understand how people discover your products by combining website traffic, search performance, and operational insights into one dashboard.

featureShowcases.heading: Understand Your Website Performance
featureShowcases.summary: Monitor traffic, search visibility, and website performance from a single workspace.
featureShowcases.body: StudioDash combines Cloudflare analytics with Google Search Console data to help you understand how visitors find your websites, support pages, and product documentation. Instead of checking multiple dashboards, you can quickly see how traffic, search visibility, and website performance are changing over time.
bullets: Monitor website traffic and visitor trends.
Review search clicks, impressions, CTR, and rankings.
Understand how website performance supports your apps and products.

image.caption: Understand how visitors discover your products and websites.

sections.heading: Website Analytics
paragraphs: StudioDash connects with Cloudflare to provide website traffic, visitor activity, page performance, and operational insights for your websites and web applications.
Whether you're monitoring a product website, support portal, or marketing pages, StudioDash helps you understand how people are interacting with your content.

sections.heading: Search Visibility
paragraphs: Google Search Console integration helps you monitor how your websites perform in search results. Review clicks, impressions, average position, indexing status, sitemap health, and other SEO insights from one place.
These metrics make it easier to understand how search visibility changes over time and identify opportunities to improve your content.

sections.heading: See the Bigger Picture
paragraphs: Website analytics become even more valuable when viewed alongside app releases, revenue, provider health, and marketing activity.
StudioDash helps you connect these different signals so you can better understand what influences traffic, downloads, and user engagement across your products.
